## Scope check

- Does this fit a multi-PiKVM desktop client (rather than something
  that belongs server-side in kvmd / ustreamer)?
- Does it need new YAML config fields, and what should defaults be?
- Are there security implications (auth, secrets, MSD)?

<!-- Note: Glasshouse runs against stock PiKVM firmware. Any feature
that requires modifying kvmd or ustreamer is out of scope. -->
